text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I are drinking some tea while we
have a meeting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm, where's the sugar? Ah! Here it is! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So then, Trainer, about our training regimen...
choice_data_list: (That... was a lot of sugar cubes.)
(That... was a lot of sugar cubes.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What do you think about making some changes
based on my race results? I personally believe
flexibility is key.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's decided then! ♪ Okay, I'm going to
give it my all tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't let her fatigue show, but it
might be the reason she's craving all that sugar. I
might want to take another look at her race
schedule.
